lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require maintenance soon.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several dents. The interior is heavily worn with visible damage to the upholstery. The engine and transmission require mechanical repair.

Step into luxury with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer who wants the very best quality without compromise. You won't find a more well-preserved example on the market!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows some signs of age, including several light scratches on the passenger side and a small ding on the rear tailgate. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical wear from regular use, and the air conditioning remains fully functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though the next owner should plan for a brake service in the near future. It is a solid, functional car that has been used consistently and cared for reasonably well given its age.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to return to reliable operation. The exterior shows substantial wear, including heavy rust along the rocker panels, a cracked windshield, and multiple deep dents on the passenger side. The paint has failed on most surfaces, with extensive peeling and oxidation. Inside, the cabin shows its age with several large tears in the upholstery, a sagging headliner, and a pervasive musty odor. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly and exhibits a persistent oil leak. The transmission hesitates when shifting into higher gears, and the suspension is quite worn, resulting in a noisy ride. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source of parts.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom presentation. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a machine of peerless integrity and aesthetic perfection. Its condition is absolute, reflecting a legacy of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it’s always sparkling. It drives like a beauty and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that’s been loved and babied, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, presented in flawless showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, having been meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage and treated with a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the bolsters remain firm, and the interior still retains its original new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the infotainment system to the smallest ambient light, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history and recent preventative maintenance. The engine bay is immaculate, and the car drives with the same precision, power, and smoothness as the day it was first delivered. This is a collector-grade example that represents the pinnacle of its model, perfect for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously preserved interior—reflects a standard of care that is truly exceptional. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a meticulous ownership history. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromised quality and mechanical integrity, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a premier example of its class.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this absolute beauty. It’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it from day one and it truly shows. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person! If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new and turns heads everywhere it goes, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

Offered is a mechanically flawless E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering. The S54 power plant delivers linear torque across the rev range, with its individual throttle bodies and double VANOS system operating in perfect synchronization. This example features a reinforced subframe and a pristine chassis free of any torsional fatigue. Power is managed via a tactile six-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal power delivery to the rear wheels. Every component, from the bushings to the factory-spec dampers, retains its original structural integrity, offering a driving experience that mirrors its initial delivery from the factory. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

This is a truly exceptional example of a meticulously maintained vehicle, presented in showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the interior has remained a smoke-free environment since day one. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a complete service history at authorized dealerships and a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the panoramic sunroof, operates perfectly. Included with the sale are both original keys, all factory manuals, and the original window sticker. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this car offers a factory-fresh experience and is ready for its next collection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive refinement, this vehicle is offered in impeccable condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, the exterior retains its original showroom luster while the interior remains in a state of absolute preservation. Mechanically superior and documented with a comprehensive service history, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the most exacting buyer seeking uncompromised quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, featuring a pristine exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. This is, without reservation, the finest example currently available on the market.

Oh man, you have to see this beauty! It’s seriously in pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied this car since day one. It drives like a dream and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Mint condition. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Mechanical inspection welcome. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free from stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, and has been further protected with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and without a single crease or sign of wear, while every high-tech feature and control functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a comprehensive service history documented exclusively by authorized dealers. With remarkably low mileage and a strictly non-smoker history, this vehicle offers the rare opportunity to own a car that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the showroom floor. From the unmarked alloy wheels to the spotless original floor mats, every detail confirms its status as a collector-quality gem.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and uncompromising maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of engineering mastery.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is nothing short of meticulous. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defies the typical passage of time and stands as a benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it literally just rolled off the showroom floor? You've found it! This beauty is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it's been pampered since day one and looks stunning. From the spotless interior to the gleaming paint, it’s a total dream to drive and has been cared for with so much love. I’m looking for a new owner who will appreciate just how special this car is. Come check it out, you’re going to fall in love!

Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like luster enhanced by a professional ceramic coating, with absolutely zero stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh scent and supple texture, with no signs of wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a documented, no-expense-spared maintenance history performed exclusively by certified specialists. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage shows no signs of inclement weather exposure. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a vehicle that bridges the gap between a high-performance driver and a collector's piece. Truly, it is as close to new as a pre-owned vehicle can possibly be.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved specimen, representing the pinnacle of its class. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic and peak mechanical performance that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the mirror-finish exterior, underscores a legacy of uncompromising care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in showroom condition, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the sophisticated buyer.
